CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-26-2006 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Aug-29-2006 Continued To Aug-29-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 220

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Aug-29-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 220, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: Melinka/Sajja, CSR: Brenda Fields.
douglas Holloway, Esq. for Plaintiff: Bank of the West.
Order waiving live testimony is in file.
After hearing the evidence presented and declaration of Ernest Knowles, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Michael Slama as follows:
Principal $25,470.73
Prejudgment Interest $837.60
Attorney's Fees $2,500.00
Costs $510.00, for a total of $29,318.33
Judgment signed in open court.
